summary: Comprehensive testing of Avatar Showcase Gallery, Gem-Gated Narrative Branches (Resonance System), and Combat Integration features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Nested button elements causing React hydration warning - button inside button for character continue cards

action_items: Consider fixing nested button elements in StarseedAdventure.js character continue cards (lines 260-281) to avoid React hydration warnings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features are working correctly: 1) Avatar Showcase Gallery with sort tabs, filters, empty state, and Gallery link in Spiritual Avatar header. 2) Gem Resonance System is integrated into story generation (code verified in starseed_adventure.py lines 174-226). 3) Combat Integration shows equipment_bonus, resonance_multiplier, and active_gem_effects in boss action response, with Combat Resonance section visible in battle result screen.

avatar_gallery.GET /api/starseed/gallery: PASS - Returns entries with filters and sort options
avatar_gallery.POST /api/starseed/gallery/{id}/radiate: PASS - Returns 404 for nonexistent, 400 for self-radiate

combat_integration.POST /api/starseed/realm/boss/initiate: PASS - Creates battle with participants and scene
combat_integration.POST /api/starseed/realm/boss/action: PASS - Returns equipment_bonus, resonance_multiplier, active_gem_effects fields

gem_resonance.GET /api/starseed/character/pleiadian: PASS - Character has gems for resonance testing

avatar_gallery.sort_tabs: PASS - 'Most Radiated' and 'Most Recent' tabs visible and functional
avatar_gallery.filter_toggle: PASS - Filter button opens Base Form and Aura filter sections
avatar_gallery.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'The gallery awaits its first creation' when no entries

spiritual_avatar.gallery_link: PASS - Gallery link button found in header with data-testid='gallery-link'

starseed_adventure.gem_resonance_badge: INFO - Gem Resonance badges depend on AI-generated choices with resonance_element field

starseed_realm.bosses_tab: PASS - 5 boss cards displayed with Fight buttons
starseed_realm.combat_resonance: PASS - Combat Resonance section visible in battle result screen showing 'x1.25 Resonance'
